_doc: Kill list — deals whose 'was' price failed verification. BOTH generators enforce this: build-deals.mjs renders the front-page Kill List from it, build-deal-hubs.mjs excludes these URLs from every department ledger and shows them in the department's own cutting-room section. Add entries by URL; never delete, set expired:true when the listing dies.

killed.reason: That $2,500 anchor is a commercial-license price no home user ever paid. Against the home license it replaces, the cut is real but far smaller. Fake anchor — skipped.
Same $2,500 commercial-license anchor as its APEX sibling. The software is real; the discount arithmetic is not. Skipped.
Third member of the same anchor family — a home license measured against a commercial-license price. Skipped.

killed.claim: “89% off” Voice Caddie SC200 practice bundle ($3,098 → $349)
killed.reason: The “was” price is a bundle misconfiguration — the SC200 is a ~$300 device on its best day, and the product URL literally ends in “-copy.” Skipped.
